secrets.name: TAURI_PRIVATE_KEY
secrets.storage: GitHub Actions environment secret or offline release signer
secrets.rotation_trigger: release signer membership change, suspected disclosure, or scheduled rotation
secrets.runtime_exposure: never shipped to clients; public key only in updater configuration once updater is enabled

secrets.name: APPLE_IDENTITY_P12_BASE64
secrets.rotation_trigger: certificate renewal, release signer membership change, or suspected disclosure
secrets.runtime_exposure: used only on macOS runner keychain during package job

secrets.name: APPLE_NOTARIZATION_CREDENTIALS
secrets.rotation_trigger: Apple credential rotation or suspected disclosure

secrets.name: WINDOWS_SIGNING_CERTIFICATE_BASE64
secrets.storage: GitHub Actions protected environment secret or hardware-backed signing provider
secrets.rotation_trigger: certificate renewal, release signer membership change, or suspected disclosure
secrets.runtime_exposure: used only by Windows signing job

secrets.name: EXTERNAL_SIGNALING_ADMIN_AUDIT_TOKEN_HEX
secrets.storage: service secret manager or /etc/discrypt/signaling.env with root-only permissions
secrets.rotation_trigger: operator change, suspected disclosure, or scheduled rotation
secrets.runtime_exposure: server process memory only; never emitted by --print-config

secrets.name: EXTERNAL_TURN_STATIC_AUTH_SECRET
secrets.storage: service secret manager or TURN service environment file with root-only permissions
secrets.rotation_trigger: operator change, suspected disclosure, or scheduled rotation
secrets.runtime_exposure: TURN credential issuer and TURN service only; invite metadata carries derived short-lived username/password/expiry

secrets.name: CRASH_REPORT_UPLOAD_TOKEN
secrets.scope: optional opt-in crash report upload endpoint
secrets.rotation_trigger: operator change, suspected disclosure, or scheduled rotation
secrets.runtime_exposure: not embedded in the app; only server-side collector authorization
